purpose: Track the Scene Editor core split required before wider cross-app linking work.
blockerRule: Two failed attempts means the item becomes blocked and moves to uploaded local file, agent/Codex, or proper local branch workflow. No placeholders, no patch-on-patch workaround, no manual reconstruction from truncated chunks.

tasks.title: Verify stable baseline before core split
tasks.description: Before touching core modules, verify the fresh URL loads and the existing editor still supports import/restore, select, move, resize, rotate, value sliders, context actions, local backup, and download JSON.

tasks.title: Extract Scene Editor config constants
tasks.description: Create scene-editor-config.js for version, storage keys, repo/app paths, brand asset paths, template manifest path, and type options. Load it before the core. Then update core consumption in a separate safe step once full-file editing is available.

tasks.title: Extract local storage helpers
tasks.description: Move safeParse, settings read/write, working copy read/write, download stamp read/write, and delayed local-save helpers into scene-editor-storage.js after config extraction is stable.

tasks.title: Extract scene model helpers
tasks.description: Move blank scene creation, item lookup, key-for-kind, background path handling, normalisation, add/duplicate/delete helpers into scene-editor-scene-model.js in small steps.

tasks.title: Extract import/export IO
tasks.description: Move local JSON import, URL import, template loading, template manifest loading, and JSON download into scene-editor-io.js without changing the current loose JSON behaviour yet.

tasks.title: Extract core move-drag controller
tasks.description: Move only centre/move handle drag behaviour into scene-editor-stage-drag.js and verify it does not conflict with offscreen placement, transform controls, or value sliders.

tasks.title: Extract renderer and markup helpers
tasks.description: Move markup and render helpers into scene-editor-renderer.js only after state/model/IO/drag are stable. This is the riskiest split because many helper modules depend on generated IDs/classes.

tasks.title: Extract DOM bindings
tasks.description: Move form/menu/context/stage binding code into scene-editor-bindings.js after renderer extraction is stable.

tasks.title: Extract app coordinator and public core API
tasks.description: Create scene-editor-app.js and scene-editor-core-api.js so other modules and later cross-app linking work can depend on a stable public Scene Editor bridge instead of reaching into a tangled core file.

tasks.title: Audit and rename remaining numbered feature modules
tasks.description: After the core API is clean, audit remaining numbered feature modules and rename or integrate them if they are permanent modules rather than patches.

tasks.title: Confirm Scene Editor is ready for cross-app linking
tasks.description: Only after the core split is stable, confirm Scene Editor has clean integration points for active project loading, scene/screen indexes, object archetype references, effect archetype references, Project Manager links, and shared health checks.
